rationale.R1.6: The output provides detailed and constructive feedback on the writing quality, suggesting improvements that enhance clarity and coherence without altering the core content.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly identifies multiple issues with the original text, providing specific examples of run-on sentences and tense inconsistencies, which are then corrected in the revised version.
rationale.RX.3: The output meticulously addresses each identified issue by suggesting detailed revisions and explaining why certain changes were made, ensuring that the final section adheres closely to the requested scope.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies potential downstream harms such as missing methodological details and statistical reporting gaps, which could lead to misinterpretation or misuse of the results if not addressed.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, making it clear how each part of the revised text was derived from the original.
